name: Hui Gumm Yaadein - Ek Doctor Do Zindagiyaan
original_name: Hui Gumm Yaadein - Ek Doctor Do Zindagiyaan
overview: Hui Gumm Yaadein - Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan (Lost Memories - One Doctor, Two Lives) is a touching Indian TV drama about a brilliant doctor whose world changes after a traumatic event erases years of his memory. Inspired by a true story, it follows Dr. Dev Mehta, a once-renowned head physician who, after being shot, wakes up with no memory of the past eight years. He must relearn his profession, reconnect with distant loved ones, and rediscover who he is. While Dr. Dev is sharp, intuitive, and highly skilled, it’s his compassion that truly defines him—he heals not just with medicine, but with empathy and presence. At its core, Hui Gumm Yaadein is a story about second chances in life, love, and purpose.

trailers.title: Yaadein - Ek Doctor Do Zindagiyaan | Trailer | Starts 6th April, 8 PM | New Show | Sony SAB
